bits.premise: A childlike appearance is mistaken for sexual excitement, then the entire romantic scenario is revealed to be fabricated.
Gluten intolerance signals such physical weakness that it destroys romantic relationships and breeds suicidal despair.

lines.text: - So I was making out with my girlfriend last week.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: - Things were heating up.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She started taking her clothes off.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She was like, "Max, you look like a kid in a candy store."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I said, "Babe, it's not you.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I look like a kid in any store."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Just kidding.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I don't have a girlfriend.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I can't keep a girlfriend, all right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause they don't feel safe with me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Because I'm gluten-free.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I mean, I can't even fight off a little Debbie.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It sucks, right? Like someone brings donuts to work.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I can't have any.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Apple fritter, straight to the shitter.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Being gluten-free is so depressing.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The only time I even think about using a toaster
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is when I'm taking a bath.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Guys, come on.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: My therapist said I need an outlet.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: - Thank you.
lines.label: fluff
